title: Broken Stones│碎裂的石頭
description: Stone slabs and stone stairs will break into cobblestone after being destroyed, and can be restored to their original state through a furnace.│石頭台階和石頭樓梯被破壞後會碎成圓石的，並且可以透過熔爐恢復原狀。
body:
# Function│功能
- Stone Stairs will drop Cobblestone Stairs when broken│石頭階梯被破壞後會掉落鵝卵石階梯
- Stone Slab will drop Cobblestone Slab when broken│石頭台階被破壞後會掉落鵝卵石台階
- Cobblestone Stairs can be smelted into Stone Stairs using a Furnace│透過熔爐可將鵝卵石階梯熔煉為石頭階梯
- Cobblestone Slab can be smelted into Stone Slab using a Furnace│透過熔爐可將鵝卵石台階熔煉為石頭台階
# Idea Source│想法來源
This datapack is based on the idea of ​​[Cobblestone Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblestone-drops), but this datapack fixes some of the bugs in [Cobblestone Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblestone-drops).│這個資料包的想法來源於 [Cobblestone Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblestone-drops) ，但是這個資料包修復了 [Cobblestone Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblestone-drops) 的一些漏洞。
# Remarks│備註
If you have [Blasting Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blasting-plus) installed, you will need to download the additional archive `BS_is_compatible_with_BP` as well.│如果你有安裝 [Blasting Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blasting-plus)，你需要同時下載附加檔案`BS_is_compatible_with_BP`。
